svg.aria-label: A four-panel tuning progression on the same step: proportional alone gives speed but offset and overshoot, adding derivative damps the overshoot, adding integral erases the offset, and the final panel is a clean verified response with margin
svg.title: A four-panel tuning progression on the same step: proportional alone gives speed but offset and overshoot, adding derivative damps the overshoot, adding integral erases the offset, and the final panel is a clean verified response with margin
svg.text: Tuning a controller: P → D → I → verify
